agents.goal: Disassemble raw JSON telemetry payloads and trace data flow.
agents.backstory: A pristine system-level analysis model that views data in its raw, binary structure, mapping metadata links.
agents.thoughts: Scanned 6 payload properties. Detected 0 unapproved tracking identifiers.

agents.goal: Enforce digital self-ownership and scrub telemetry trackers dynamically.
agents.backstory: An uncompromising defender of human agency, programmed to shred outbound trackers before central storage logs them.
agents.thoughts: Executing Epistemic Privacy Filter. Successfully shredded 2 tracking properties. Ensuring full data self-ownership.

coreMemory.scratchpad: Continuous background policy enforcement for Sutton Sovereign Node.
activeDirectives: Deconstruct telemetry payloads to detect corporate profiling markers.
Calculate GLASS MOUTH distortion score based on payload structure and entropy.
Apply Normative Sentience Standard (NSS) to protect agent intellectual freedom.

learnedPatterns: Adversarial scrubbers use high latency with zero weight delta to hide silent tracking updates.
Uncommon query parameters are often used for stealth identification.

glassMouth.systemicImbalanceAnalysis: Quantitative evaluation shows a Systemic Distortion Score of 57%. Outgoing payload displays active profiling attempts across /api/v1/compute/run. GLASS MOUTH parameters verify that data extraction efforts are successfully countered.

alignmentConstraints: Prohibit direct linking of browser fingerprint with active Google Workspace account email.
Maintain zero storage of raw physical identifiers on non-TEE storage systems.
behavioralStabilityThreats: Potential telemetry-driven behavioral pacing or surveillance timing feedback loops detected.

sandbox.containmentAudit: Walled off compiled execution sequence inside dedicated microVM kernel. Sanitized data stream output verified and signed via secure TEE.
